title: Activity Diagram Login
mermaidCode:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Pengguna
        A[Buka Halaman Login]
        B[Masukkan Email & Password]
    end
    subgraph Sistem [Frontend Next.js]
        C[Kirim Kredensial]
        F[Tampilkan Pesan Error]
        G[Arahkan ke Dashboard]
    end
    subgraph Database [Backend & Database]
        D{Verifikasi Data Auth.js}
        E[Kembalikan Status Gagal]
        H[Kembalikan Status Berhasil & Role]
    end

    A --> B
    B --> C
    C --> D
    D -- Tidak Valid --> E
    E --> F
    F --> B
    D -- Valid --> H
    H --> G

title: Activity Diagram Memperbarui Profil
mermaidCode:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Pengguna
        A[Buka Menu Pengaturan]
        C[Ubah Data Profil]
        D[Tekan Simpan Perubahan]
    end
    subgraph Sistem [Sistem Frontend]
        B[Tampilkan Form Profil]
        E[Kirim Request Update]
        H[Tampilkan Pesan Sukses]
    end
    subgraph Database [Backend & Database]
        F[Validasi dan Update Data]
        G[Kembalikan Response Sukses]
    end
    A --> B
    B --> C
    C --> D
    D --> E
    E --> F
    F --> G
    G --> H

title: Activity Diagram Personal Plan (Onboarding)
mermaidCode:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Pengguna
        A[Login Berhasil]
        E[Isi Profil & Target PTN]
        H[Mulai Diagnostic Try Out]
    end
    subgraph Sistem [Sistem Frontend]
        B[Cek Status Onboarding]
        C{Apakah Pengguna Baru?}
        D[Tampilkan Form Onboarding]
        F[Kirim Data Profil]
        I[Tampilkan Soal Diagnostic]
        K[Arahkan ke Dashboard]
    end
    subgraph Database [Backend & Database]
        G[Simpan Data User & Target]
        J[Evaluasi Baseline & Simpan]
    end
    A --> B
    B --> C
    C -- Tidak --> K
    C -- Ya --> D
    D --> E
    E --> F
    F --> G
    G --> H
    H --> I
    I --> J
    J --> K

title: Activity Diagram Mode Belajar (Latihan Soal)
mermaidCode:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Pengguna
        A[Pilih Bab Materi]
        C[Kerjakan Soal]
        F[Jawab Ulang Second Chance]
    end
    subgraph Sistem [Sistem Frontend]
        B[Sajikan 10 Soal Bank Soal]
        D[Evaluasi Jawaban Lokal]
        E{Apakah Benar?}
        G{Cek Jumlah Percobaan}
        I[Tampilkan Pertanyaan Socratic]
        J[Tampilkan Jawaban & Solusi Lengkap]
        K[Lanjut Soal Berikutnya]
        L{Apakah Semua Selesai?}
        M[Tampilkan Ringkasan Akurasi]
    end
    subgraph Database [Backend & Database]
        N[Update Mastery Tracking & Chapter Progress]
    end
    subgraph AI [AI Tutor Groq]
        H[Generate Socratic Hint]
    end
    
    A --> B
    B --> C
    C --> D
    D --> E
    E -- Benar --> K
    E -- Salah --> G
    G -- Percobaan 1 --> H
    H --> I
    I --> F
    F --> D
    G -- Percobaan 2 --> J
    J --> K
    K --> L
    L -- Belum --> C
    L -- Selesai --> M
    M --> N

    A --> B

    C --> D
    D --> E
    E --> F
    F --> G
    G --> H
    H --> I

title: Activity Diagram Manajemen User
mermaidCode:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Superadmin

        D[Gunakan Fitur Filter / Cari]
        G[Tekan Edit atau Hapus Akun]
    end
    subgraph Sistem [Sistem Frontend]
        B[Kirim Request Daftar User]
        E[Kirim Request Filter]
        H[Kirim Mutasi Data]
        J[Refresh Tampilan Tabel]
    end
    subgraph Database [Backend & Database]
        C[Query Data User & Statistik Tryout]
        F[Query Data Terfilter]
        I[Update / Hapus Akun di Database]
    end
    
    A --> B
    B --> C
    C --> J
    D --> E
    E --> F
    F --> J
    G --> H
    H --> I
    I --> B
